race.comment: FERRAT (5) hit the frame two starts ago at this track but ran below par last time when sixth and beaten 7 lengths over 1200m at this track. Well placed and there is no reason she cannot find winning ways. MAGNUS AURELIUS (1) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race and finished 9 lengths away in sixth last time out over 1000m at this track. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways. CASUAL VISION (11) has not appeared since he finished 14th over 1000m at this track on February 20. Looks one of the genuine hopes in the race. QUIEN ME PILLO (2) was beaten 18 lengths into fifth in a 1200m contest at this track a week-and-a-half ago. Suitably placed so can turn things around.
